name: agent_v2
description: Externalized modular agent v2 with LangGraph routing, structured tool planning, custom tool execution, guarded code generation, and workspace-kernel-backed runtime execution.
features: Structured tool planning with short operational explanations
Custom tool execution that emits ToolMessage objects and trace-friendly tool call/result metadata
Schema search, schema chunk scan, and sample-data enrichment tools
Workspace-kernel-backed Python execution and runtime result validation
Code safety guardrails and retry loop
